title: Job Opening Teacher at Skill India Mission Partners

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Skill India Mission Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the Skill India Mission Partners family as a Teacher in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Skill India Mission Partners:
Skill India Mission Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Skill India Mission Partners!
